zh.Chadwell in Barking, Essex, England: 英國艾可查阿德維爾 在 巴爾金
zh.London, London, England: 英國英格蘭倫敦聖 巴沙洛繆 白 馮 羅雅爾 艾可昌
zh.St Andrew Undershaft Churchyard, Bishops: 英國素瑞比曉普斯蓋特
zh.St. Mary Matfellon Whitechapel St. Giles: 英國英格蘭米德萊可聖 基路士
zh.lifeSummary: 當Phillip Malpas於1380年2月出生在英國艾可查阿德維爾 在 巴爾金時，他的父親Hugh Edgerton De Malpas47歲，母親Margaret Blackenhall49歲。他於1423年與Julian Machyn在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 巴沙洛繆 白 馮 羅雅爾 艾可昌結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他於1430年在英國倫敦被列為sheriff。他去世於1469年在英國倫敦享年89歲，埋葬在英國素瑞比曉普斯蓋特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Phillip Malpas于1380年2月出生在英国艾可查阿德維爾 在 巴爾金时，他的父亲Hugh Edgerton De Malpas47岁，母亲Margaret Blackenhall49岁。他于1423年与Julian Machyn在英国英格兰倫敦聖 巴沙洛繆 白 馮 羅雅爾 艾可昌结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他于1430年在英国倫敦被列为sheriff。他去世于1469年在英国倫敦享年89岁，埋葬在英国素瑞比曉普斯蓋特。

nameMeanings.name: Malpas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Malpass
meanings: English (Staffordshire and Gloucestershire): habitational name, chiefly from either of two places called Malpas (Cheshire, England and Monmouthshire, Wales); perhaps also occasionally from other minor places so called in England (e.g. in Berkshire, Cornwall, and Yorkshire) or from various places called Malpas or Maupas in France. The placenames derive from Old French mal ‘bad’ + pas ‘passage’.

nameMeanings.name: Phillip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Philip , in part a reflection of the surname, which is usually spelled Phillips.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Phillip Malpas was born in February 1380, in Chadwell in Barking, Essex, England, his father, Hugh Edgerton De Malpas, was 47 and his mother, Margaret Blackenhall, was 49. He married Julian Machyn in 1423, in St Bartholomew by The Royal Exchange, London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. In 1430, at the age of 50, his occupation is listed as sheriff in London, England. He died in 1469, in London, England, at the age of 89, and was buried in Bishopsgate, Surrey, England.

fr.London, London, England: St Bartholomew by The Royal Exchange, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Phillip Malpas est né en février 1380, à Chadwell in Barking, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Edgerton De Malpas, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Margaret Blackenhall, avait 49 ans. Il a épousé Julian Machyn en 1423, à St Bartholomew by The Royal Exchange, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. En 1430, à l’âge de 50 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff à Londres, Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1469, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 89 ans, et a été enterré à Bishopsgate, Surrey, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Phillip Malpas im Februar 1380 in Chadwell in Barking, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh Edgerton De Malpas 47 und seine Mutter Margaret Blackenhall 49. Er hat 1423 in St Bartholomew by The Royal Exchange, London, England, United Kingdom Julian Machyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. 1430, als er 50 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff in London, England aufgeführt. Er starb 1469 im Alter von 89 Jahren in London, England und wurde in Bishopsgate, Surrey, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Phillip Malpas è nato il nel febbraio 1380 nel Chadwell in Barking, Essex, England, il suo padre, Hugh Edgerton De Malpas, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Blackenhall, aveva 49 anni. Lui sposato Julian Machyn nel 1423, nel St Bartholomew by The Royal Exchange, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Nel 1430, all'età di 50 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff nel London, England. Morì nel 1469, nel London, England, all'età di 89 anni, e fu sepolto a Bishopsgate, Surrey, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Phillip Malpasが1380年2月にイギリスエセックスチャドウエル イン バーキングで生まれた時，父Hugh Edgerton De Malpasは47歳，母Margaret Blackenhallは49歳であった。1423年にイギリスイギリスロンドンスト バーソロメウ ビー ス ロイアル エクスチャンッジでJulian Machynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。1430年，50歳の時，イギリスロンドンでの職業はsheriffと記録されている。彼は1469年にイギリスロンドンで89歳で死去し，イギリススリービショプスガトにて埋葬された。

ko.London, London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 바토롬w 비 테 로야 스창
ko.lifeSummary: Phillip Malpas(이)가 1380년 2월 영국 에세스 채드웰 인 바킨그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Edgerton De Malpas(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Blackenhall(은)는 49세였다. 그는 1423년 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 바토롬w 비 테 로야 스창에서 Julian Machyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1430년, 50세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 런던에서 sheriff이었다. 그는 1469년 영국 런던에서 89세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수리 비숍스가트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Phillip Malpas nasceu em fevereiro de 1380, em Chadwell in Barking, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Edgerton De Malpas, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Blackenhall, tinha 49 anos. Ele casou-se com Julian Machyn em 1423, em St Bartholomew by The Royal Exchange, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Em 1430, com 50 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff em London, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1469, em London, Inglaterra, com 89 anos, e foi sepultado em Bishopsgate, Surrey, Inglaterra.

ru.London, London, England: ст бартоломю би т рояль эксчанг, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Phillip Malpas родился февраль 1380 г. в местности чэдвелл ин баркинг, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh Edgerton De Malpas было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Blackenhall, 49. Он женился на женщине по имени Julian Machyn в 1423 г. в местности ст бартоломю би т рояль эксчанг, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. В 1430 году, в возрасте 50 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff в местности Лондон, Англия. Он умер в 1469 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 89 лет и был похоронен в местности бишопсгэит, сурри, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Phillip Malpas nació en febrero de 1380, en Chadwell in Barking, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh Edgerton De Malpas, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Margaret Blackenhall, tenía 49 años. Se casó con Julian Machyn en 1423, en St Bartholomew by The Royal Exchange, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. En 1430, a la edad de 50 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff en London, Inglaterra. Murió en 1469, en London, Inglaterra, a la edad de 89 años, y fue sepultado en Bishopsgate, Surrey, Inglaterra.
